description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and deploy, using alpine:latest as the global Docker image and a before_script that installs make via apk add --update make. Add a size-check job in the test stage that runs the shell command make size-check. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that uses the conoria/alpine-pandoc:latest image, runs the command make, is limited to the master branch (only: master), and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact. Add a preview job also in the deploy stage, using the same image and script make, runs on all branches except master (except: master), and also uploads the public/ directory as an artifact.
